# Email Campaign Skill

Email Campaign Skill is a skill package for campaign briefs, audience logic, creative QA, and post-send analysis.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add emailcampaignskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://emailcampaignskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://emailcampaignskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://emailcampaignskill.com/skills/emailcampaignskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://emailcampaignskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Email Campaign Strategy: https://emailcampaignskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Email Campaign Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://emailcampaignskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Email Campaign Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://emailcampaignskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
